notes: Hillsborough FL Clerk of Circuit Courts (https://publicaccess.hillsclerk.com/oripublicaccess/). Pure-HTTP adapter at adapters/hillsborough_http_adapter.py. NO Cloudflare / NO anti-bot — bare Microsoft-IIS/10.0. Endpoint: POST /Public/ORIUtilities/DocumentSearch/api/Search with JSON body {PartyName:['LAST FIRST']} (or {Instrument:[n]} or {BookNum,PageNum,BookType:'O'}). Response: {Success, ResultList:[{Instrument, PartiesOne, PartiesTwo, RecordDate (epoch s), DocType ('(D) DEED' style), BookType/BookNum/PageNum, Legal, ID (opaque), UUID, PageCount}]}. PDF download: GET /Public/ORIUtilities/OverlayWatermark/api/Watermark/{url_quoted_ID} with Referer: /oripublicaccess/ — returns watermarked PDF binary. Test subjects (verified 2026-05-26): FROMER (ALANA + MICHAEL @ 4004 W NORTH B ST TAMPA, folio 1151460000, PIN 1829213LS000012000040A, vesting QCD doc 2025214758 2025-05-15; prior WD Smith->Fromer Alana 1971 OR BK 2411 PG 752 inst -6338677); DEL MONTE (ANGEL + CHRISTINE @ 13519 WESTSHIRE DR TAMPA, folio 0188840142, PIN 1828030UD000000000210U, vesting WD Priority One Developers->Del Monte 1995-02-01 inst 95030837 OR BK 7666 PG 358). Combined name search (Hillsborough doesn't split party-type at the endpoint level — adapter post-filters when Grantor/Grantee is requested specifically).
